{{Quote|Besides, with me you also get an expert shuttle pilot. ''And'' a dash' fine shuttle.|[[Brophar Tofarain]]|<ref name="The DarkStryder Campaign">{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref>}}
The '''''Muvon''''' was a [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]] [[B-7 light freighter]] owned by [[Brophar Tofarain]].

==History==
===Personal transport===
For many years, the ''Muvon'' served Brophar Tofarain as a personal shuttle, transporting him from planet to planet while he saw the galaxy. Eventually, Tofarain settled on [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], and the ''Muvon'' was kept in a secure hangar. Unlike many ships, it survived the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] liberation of the planet during the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol]].

===In service to the ''FarStar''===
During the liberation of Kal'Shebbol, Tofarain's repair shop was destroyed. Seeking compensation, Tofarain signed onto the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'', which was assigned to search the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] for [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]. As part of the deal, he offered the use of the ''Muvon''. Commonly used as a personnel transport, the ship carried no New Republic markings and could easily pass for a civilian transport hauler when a more subtle approach was needed. Used to deliver landing parties to the surface of planets the ''FarStar'' visited, Tofarain insisted on personally flying the ship himself.

===Theft===
During a mission to the planet [[Uukaablis]], the ''Muvon'' was stolen by the ''FarStar''{{'s}} [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] first officer, [[Gorak Khzam]], and the [[Turazza]], [[Nizzal]]. They used the ship to defect and hook up with the [[Skandrei Bandits]].

==Behind the scenes==
''Muvon'' is a play on "move on", following the apparent trend of using puns to name [[Transport/Legends|transports]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
